mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_paper ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_paper WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_paper WHERE create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_paper WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_paper WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_paper (paper_name, subject_id, total_score, pass_score, duration, question_count, create_by, status) VALUES (#{paperName}, #{subjectId}, #{totalScore}, #{passScore}, #{duration}, #{questionCount}, #{createBy}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_paper SET paper_name = #{paperName}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, total_score = #{totalScore}, pass_score = #{passScore}, duration = #{duration}, question_count = #{questionCount}, status = #{status} WHERE paper_id = #{paperId}
